title: LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS - 211info
text: EUGENE COMMUNITY COURT LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects people to housing programs, including shelter information, other housing resources, tenant support, and non-housing resources. Does not provide emergency housing or rental assistance, and there may be a waitlist. 1102 Lincoln Street Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Individuals age 18 and older or families with minor children who are homeless or at risk of becoming homeless Hours: Wednesday 1:30pm-3:30pm Email (541) 682-5400 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 682-5400 Main phone Main phone (541) 682-5400 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: City of Eugene SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-4pm Services: Housing Related Coordinated Entry Housing Related Coordinated Entry * Homeless Families If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EUGENE COMMUNITY COURT
